security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: blob: data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: https://niivue.github.io; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Medical image viewer for NIfTI and DICOM files
bundle.longDescription: NiiVue Desktop is a high-performance medical image viewer built with Tauri and WebGL2. It supports NIfTI, DICOM, and many other neuroimaging formats with direct filesystem access for fast loading of large datasets.
